steps.title: Identify the student's stated goal
steps.content: The prompt explicitly states the student wants to specify the shawl's name in Choctaw. Looking at the notes, the Choctaw name for the shawl is anchi.

steps.title: Evaluate which choice provides that specification
steps.content: Choice A directly accomplishes the goal by stating the shawl “is called an anchi in Choctaw”. Choices B, C, and D omit the shawl's Choctaw name or include unrelated information. That matches choice A — A is correct.
